name: outsourcing
strengths: 1. **Scan-to-BIM expertise** — Known as a leading specialist in point cloud to BIM conversion, complex existing conditions modeling
2. **US-headquartered** — American management with India delivery, strong US market understanding
3. **Diverse project types** — Works on heritage, industrial, commercial, residential, and infrastructure projects
4. **Technology adoption** — Early adopters of Revit 202x features, point cloud processing tools
5. **Client communication** — Dedicated project managers, strong English proficiency
weaknesses: 1. **Brand confusion** — Name similarity to Tesla Inc. creates search/credibility issues
2. **Narrow perceived scope** — Often seen as scan-to-BIM only, not full-service BIM provider
3. **Mid-market focus** — Fewer large enterprise clients compared to top-tier competitors
4. **Limited marketing** — Lower online visibility relative to service quality
5. **Geographic spread** — Single India delivery location limits redundancy
